title: repo.intaken.v1 payload
description: Payload of the repo.intaken.v1 event — notification that a repository/source intake snapshot has been captured. Thin notification projection of domain/source-snapshot; never carries source content or file listings.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: approved plan §2 event row (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5 'event/ 6종', deliverable 5 — 'field names match domain/source-snapshot exactly'); events/catalog/README.md CONFIRMED topic list (repo.intaken.v1, producer repository-intake-service). Field names copied verbatim from domain/source-snapshot/v1: repo_commit ($ref git_sha), content_hash ($ref sha256_ref, sole ledger anchor per contract-catalog.md 'hash만 ledger'), snapshot_uri ($ref uri_ref). NO additionalProperties:false (open class).

content_hash.$comment: domain/source-snapshot/v1#/properties/content_hash exact field name and shape — idempotency key + sole ledger anchor (contract-catalog.md:25 'hash만 ledger').

snapshot_uri.$comment: domain/source-snapshot/v1#/properties/snapshot_uri exact field name and shape — uri_ref forbids query/fragment (ADR-0024(f), R9-5 presigned-token smuggling defense).
